title: Lapisworks
description: Harness Lapis' enchanting power with Hex Casting's media and enchant.. At this point, literally everything.
body:
# Lapisworks?
*~~yeah, i think it does~~*  
Lapisworks is an addon for Hex Casting that allows you to enchant yourself with the help of a new item made by fusing Lapis Lazuli and Hex Casting's media. You can:
- Enchant your skin.
- Enchant your fists.
- Enchant your feet.
- Enchant your arms (everything other than the fists).
- Permanently enchant your swords, giving them special uses.
- Permanently enchant your staves.
- Give yourself literal enchantments that have an effect beyond simple buffs.
- Rediscover the knowledge of an ancient, evil wizard, who was perhaps the greatest Lapisworker to have lived.
- Make constructs (like a container for a simple mind) with the help of Lapis.
- Imbue simple minds into blocks (such as a Jukebox) to give them extra functionality or otherwise.

## DOES THIS WORK WITH HEXCONNECT?
It *does* seem to at least start given you have Fabric Language Kotlin and Trinkets. The stuff that doesn't work:
- As of the latest test, everything seems to work.
  
(Above list will be updated with time if or when more bugs appear. If you find any make sure to tell me on the issue tracker.)

## NOTICE  
To know of anything that might concern you when you migrate from a lower version of the mod to a higher one, see the Changelogs tab on this page. (Relevant information should be under "**NOTE FOR MIGRATORS:**".)
